_layout_notes: HDFC ships per-LOB files for the monthly cycle (5 files for April 2026):
1. ROBINHOOD Final Rate Pvt Car.xlsx       — Pvt Car Comp+SAOD by Zone1/Zone2
2. Revised Geography Groupings -Pvt Car.xlsx — state→zone master (Sheet2 used)
3. SA-TP Grid St v1.xlsx                   — Pvt Car SATP by Zone+State+Location+Fuel+CC
4. TW Non New Combined Grid ST.xlsx        — TW Comp/TP, SAOD with make exclusions
5. GCV Grid Effective 01042026 - With RTO List.xlsx — GCV multi-weight-band grid with
free-text cell rules (Bolero/Tata/age/decline carve-outs, Grid+N% formulas)
Sheet matching uses file_pattern to disambiguate (multiple files have a 'Grid' sheet).
Geography master and Location master sheets are loaded in-engine as state→zone /
location→cluster lookups; they are NOT emitted as rate rules.
